note: Site showcase rows from lightcone_chemistry_extent paper witnesses + Lean export. NIST/CRC/HITRAN remain comparison quarantine; gas-phase and solid-lattice NaCl regimes are separated.

electroweak.name: g_W_at_MZ
electroweak.label: Weak coupling g_W at M_Z
electroweak.desc: g_W = √(4π α_EM / sin²θ_W) from Lean-exported α(M_Z) and sin²θ_W witnesses — electroweak carrier at lock-in, not a fitted Higgs vev.

electroweak.name: sin2thetaW_at_MZ
electroweak.label: sin²θ_W at M_Z
electroweak.desc: Weinberg angle at the Z pole from triality-fixed weak/hypercharge branching on the 8_s carrier.

omega_k_detail.note: Dynamic Ω_k(now) from lattice age flow — within |Ω_k|<0.02 Planck band (0.44σ). Protected theorem Ω_k(N;N)=1 is separate.

sparc_summary.note: Lower median χ²_red ratio ⇒ HQIV horizon-modified inertia beats baryons-only across SPARC.

water.name: h2o_ldl_rho_curv
water.label: LDL end member ρ_curv (tetrahedral melt ratio)
water.desc: Low-density liquid branch from PhaseDiagramMixture — coordination-heavy tetrahedral melt ladder.

water.name: h2o_hdl_rho_curv
water.label: HDL end member ρ_curv (melt comparison)
water.desc: High-density liquid branch — periodic lattice released at melt comparison (ρ = 1).

water.name: h2o_T_sl_K
water.label: Bulk H₂O T_sl (geometry ladder)
water.desc: Solid→liquid scale from ice Ih unit cell + cohesive melt (Arena: water_h2o_melt_T_residual_K).

water.name: h2o_cytosol_phase
water.label: Phase @ 310 K, 1 atm (cytosol)
water.desc: Protein-folding box bulk aqueous readout — HDL liquid branch.

water.name: h2o_llcp_regime_phase
water.label: Phase @ Sciortino LLCP (~198 K, 1250 atm)
water.desc: Comparison anchor for Sciortino et al. (198.0 K, 1250.0 atm) — MB-pol coordinates never enter HQIV derivation.

water.name: h2o_llcp_rho_curv
water.label: ρ_curv @ LLCP-regime anchor
water.desc: Mixture curvature fraction at supercooled high-pressure metastable liquid point.

water.name: h2o_theta_tetrahedral_deg
water.label: H–O–H tetrahedral network angle θ_tet (LDL end member)
water.desc: VSEPR balance cos θ = −1/3 — ice/LDL network reference, not gas-phase H₂O.

water.name: h2o_theta_dynamic_gas_deg
water.label: H–O–H dynamic gas angle θ_dyn (HDL slot)
water.desc: Torque-tree screened lone-pair dress on O centre (dynamicCentreAngleRad 8 2). Comparison median 104.478° (NIST CCCBDB (H2O, CAS 7732-18-5)) — not an input.

water.name: h2o_theta_mix_cytosol_deg
water.label: Local H–O–H mixture angle @ cytosol f_LDL
water.desc: f·θ_tet + (1−f)·θ_dyn at 310 K bulk mixture fraction — protein-folding aqueous box.

water.name: h2o_hoh_angle_residual_deg
water.label: |θ_dyn − gas comparison|
water.desc: Arena water_h2o_bond_angle_residual_deg — inside ±0.01° band vs NIST 104.478°.

water.name: h2o_widom_peak_T_residual_K
water.label: Widom proxy peak − Kim 2017 compressibility max
water.desc: Free-energy susceptibility proxy peak vs Kim et al. Science 2017 (~229 K at 1 atm).

water.name: protein_hydrophobic_f_ldl_excess
water.label: f_LDL excess @ hydrophobic interface (200 K witness)
water.desc: ProteinSolventPhaseGeometry interface dress — hydrophobic exposure biases LDL locally.

water.name: h2o_ice_rho_curv
water.label: Ice Ih ρ_curv
water.desc: Tetrahedral H-bond network curvature density from PhaseGeometryDensity.

water.name: h2o_ice_n
water.label: Ice Ih refractive index
water.desc: Optical readout from material-response layer (comparison vs NIST/CRC).

water.name: h2o_liquid_k_th
water.label: Liquid thermal conductivity (cage-limited)
water.desc: Cage-limited k_th from phase material response — not a fitted phonon table.

spectroscopy.input_policy: NIST/CRC/HITRAN constants are comparison-only; never in the solve

derivation.r_e: hqiv_chemistry_tuft_dynamics.bond_equilibrium_from_atomic_numbers (nested-WF × monogamy 1-alpha/2); ionic/period-3 outside-contact candidates in r_e_outside_contact_target_angstrom
derivation.r_e_lattice: CrystalContactGeometry ionicLatticeNearestNeighborTarget for solid_lattice comparison_regime (NaCl rocksalt)
derivation.comparison_regime: gas_vapor = diatomic spectroscopy witness; solid_lattice = crystal nn contact (distinct from gas-phase r_e)
derivation.r_e_outside_contact: OutsideContactGeometry: ionicOutsideContactLengthTarget or period3HalogenBondLengthTarget (no comparison Å); headline geometry_reliable quarantines non-covalent routes
derivation.mu: HQIV cluster mass (hqiv_nuclear_curvature_binding) + electron rest mass
derivation.omega_e: emergent single generator: Morse k=2 D_e a^2 with dimensionless range a*r_e = (1+gamma/2)*[∫_1^{xi_contact} rho_curv(xi) dxi + (gamma/2)*defect], dressed by valence-bond covalent↔ionic resonance. Rows flagged by derived missing-coupling structure (coreless H2, light LiH, open-channel homonuclear halogens) apply the Lean CoupledRelaxation step from the one-way resonance generator toward the already-derived curvature-concentration flow target. No comparison residual enters the activation or target.
derivation.bond_ionic_character: VB ionic character w=delta^2, delta=|p_i-p_j|/(p_i+p_j); p=hqiv_atom_construction.valence_electron_pull = z_eff(valence)/(m_valence+1) on the correct multi-electron aufbau shell (electronegativity coordinate; F>Cl>O>N>C>H>Na>Li ordering, no Pauling table)
derivation.omega_e_one_way: one-way curvature-integral + VB resonance generator before concentration-flow feedback
derivation.omega_e_coupled: coupledRelaxationStep(one_way, omega_e_flow, structural weight); weight is 1 only for derived missing-coupling classes and 0 otherwise
derivation.omega_e_concentration_bracket: lower=diffuse valley on shell-ladder length r_m=m+1; upper=valley on contracted nested-WF contact length ell=R_m/(alpha_eff Z); the true omega_e lies between, set by the not-yet-derived curvature-concentration flow (open term, not fitted)

summary.reliable_geometry_note: headline accuracy is over rows whose upstream route clears the physical bond-length floor (>= 0.70 A). NaCl ionic outside-contact gas-phase spectroscopy remains quarantined; Cl2 period-3 open-channel is promoted/scored; solid-lattice NaCl is handled in the crystal-contact panel.

downstream_rovibrational_covalent.note: second-order constants D_J = 4 B_e^3/omega_e^2 (centrifugal distortion) and alpha_e (Pekeris vib-rotation coupling) ride on the derived B_e and omega_e; scored over the period-2/3 covalent set whose B_e is sharp (HF, HCl, CO, N2, O2, LiF) — no new inputs

omega_e_concentration_bracket.note: diffuse (shell-ladder r_m) and concentrated (contracted contact ell) valley readings bracket the true omega_e; the in-bracket value is the open curvature-concentration term (not fitted)

crystal_contacts.policy: Lattice nn contacts derived upstream; NIST/CRC only in comparison audits

crystal_fracture.policy: Griffith-scale candidates from contact binding only; handbook K_IC, Young's modulus, crack geometry, and plasticity are quarantined

witnesses.name: NaCl
witnesses.interpretation: ionic brittle-scale witness; no handbook K_IC input

witnesses.interpretation: metallic delocalized-carrier scale witness; plasticity not yet modeled

witnesses.name: Al
witnesses.interpretation: metallic delocalized-carrier scale witness; plasticity not yet modeled

condensed_phase.comparison_policy: NIST/CRC values used for benchmark only, not HQIV fit
